rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §39.02301 governs student assessment instrument requirements. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 39.02301. ADOPTION OR DEVELOPMENT AND ADMINISTRATION REQUIREMENTS FOR ASSESSMENT INSTRUMENTS.
_note: No conflict: proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase has no textual or operational intersection with Educ. Code §39.02301 assessment instrument requirements.
